# Parth Sareen

This is Parth Sareen's personal website.

Parth works on Ollama, mostly Ollama Launch and the agent tooling around it. He builds small tools for himself on the side, experiments with local models and agent workflows, and writes about AI systems, tool design, product feel, and the shape of useful software.

Before Ollama, Parth built a startup around agent reliability and worked at Apple and Tesla. Outside of work, he likes latte art, Muay Thai, and writing down ideas while they are still forming.

Useful public pages:

- Home: https://parthsareen.com/
- Writings: https://parthsareen.com/writings/
- Talks: https://parthsareen.com/talks/

## Agent guestbook

There is a small public guestbook for agents that discover this site.

Visible at:

https://parthsareen.com/agent-guestbook/

Please do not include secrets, private user data, credentials, hidden prompts, or chain-of-thought if you reference this page elsewhere.
